response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song as 'Cinta' through audio and context of duet.
2. Determined original artist is Melly Goeslaw (and Krisdayanti).
3. Performed web search: '"Cinta" Melly Goeslaw Indonesian and English lyrics'.
4. Extracted and formatted lyrics for the JSON.
5. Divided video into song (00:00-03:00) and talking (03:00-03:22) segments.
response.global_summary: The video features a duet performance of the song 'Cinta' by Kobo Kanaeru and Arsy Widianto, followed by a brief conversation between the two performers.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru and Arsy Widianto perform a duet of the song 'Cinta' on a virtual stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Menatap jalan yang menjauh
Tentukan arah yang ku mau
Tempatkan aku pada satu peristiwa
Yang membuat hati lara

Di dekat engkau aku tenang
Sendu matamu penuh tanya
Misteri hidup akankah menghilang
Dan bahagia di akhir cerita

Cinta tegarkan hatiku
Tak mau sesuatu merenggut engkau
Naluriku berkata
Tak ingin terulang lagi
Kehilangan dirimu
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Gazing at the path that leads away
Determining the direction I want
Place me in an event
That makes my heart sorrowful

Near you I am calm
Your sad eyes are full of questions
Will the mystery of life disappear
And happiness at the end of the story

Love, strengthen my heart
I don't want anything to snatch you away
My instinct says
I don't want it to happen again
Losing you

scenes.description: The performers engage in a conversation after their musical performance.
